symptom_description: Yellow and white streaks running parallel along leaves. Younger leaves more affected. Stunted growth.
recommended_action: No chemical cure. Rogue infected plants. Use MSV-tolerant variety in next season (e.g. SAMMAZ 15). Control leafhopper vector with approved insecticide.

symptom_description: Dark brown to black lesions on leaves with yellow halo. Water-soaked look. Spreads rapidly in cool wet weather.
recommended_action: Apply Ridomil Gold (mefenoxam + mancozeb) within 24 hours. Increase row spacing for airflow. Monitor every 3 days. Destroy heavily infected foliage.

symptom_description: Reddish-brown oval spots on leaves with grey centres. Spots merge at high density. Lower leaves worst affected.
recommended_action: Apply Mancozeb 80WP at 2kg/ha. Improve drainage. Rotate with legume next season.

symptom_description: White powdery coating on leaves and stem. Distorted leaf growth. Yellowing around affected patches.
recommended_action: Remove and burn infected plants. Treat seed with Metalaxyl before next planting. Use resistant varieties like SAMSORG 17.

symptom_description: Black-brown rot starting at pod tip. White mycelium visible in humid conditions. Pod turns mummified.
recommended_action: Remove and bury all infected pods immediately. Apply Ridomil or copper-based fungicide. Prune canopy to reduce humidity. Harvest early if infection present.

symptom_description: Angular brown lesions on leaves limited by leaf veins. Water-soaked spots on pods turning brick-red.
recommended_action: Apply Copper Oxychloride 50WP. Use certified disease-free seed. Avoid overhead irrigation. Rotate with cereals.

symptom_description: Small circular yellow spots on upper surface, corresponding brown pustules underneath. Leaves dropping early.
recommended_action: Apply Chlorothalonil (Bravo 500SC) every 14 days. Use SAMNUT 24 or 25 tolerant varieties next cycle.

symptom_description: Orange-yellow pustules in stripes running along leaf veins. Young leaves severely affected.
expected_diagnosis: Wheat yellow rust / stripe rust (Puccinia striiformis)
recommended_action: Apply Tebuconazole (Folicur 250EC) immediately. This is a high-priority threat — report to district agriculture office. Do not save seed from infected crop.
